mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_book (user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wrong_book_item WHERE wrong_book_id = #{wrongBookId} AND problem_id = #{problemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_book_item (wrong_book_id, problem_id, submit_id, code, language, error_message, knowledge_points, review_status, last_review_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{wrongBookId}, #{problemId}, #{submitId}, #{code}, #{language}, #{errorMessage}, #{knowledgePoints}, #{reviewStatus}, #{lastReviewTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM review_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY next_review_time ASC
SELECT * FROM review_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND next_review_time <= #{currentTime} AND status = 0 ORDER BY next_review_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_plan (user_id, wrong_item_id, next_review_time, review_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{wrongItemId}, #{nextReviewTime}, #{reviewCount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE review_plan SET next_review_time = #{nextReviewTime}, review_count = #{reviewCount}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN review_status = 1 THEN 1 END) as reviewedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN review_status = 0 THEN 1 END) as pendingCount FROM wrong_book_item WHERE wrong_book_id = (SELECT id FROM wrong_book WHERE user_id = #{userId})

SELECT knowledge_points as knowledgePoint, COUNT(*) as count FROM wrong_book_item WHERE wrong_book_id = (SELECT id FROM wrong_book WHERE user_id = #{userId}) GROUP BY knowledge_points ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT p.difficulty, COUNT(*) as count FROM wrong_book_item wbi JOIN problem p ON wbi.problem_id = p.id WHERE wbi.wrong_book_id = (SELECT id FROM wrong_book WHERE user_id = #{userId}) GROUP BY p.difficulty ORDER BY p.difficulty ASC
